properties.name: lottocheck.logging.file.path
properties.description: Directory where application log files are stored.

properties.name: lottocheck.logging.file.max-size
properties.description: Maximum size of a single active log file before rollover.

properties.name: lottocheck.logging.file.archive-max-age
properties.description: Maximum age of archived log files before deletion.

properties.name: lottocheck.logging.file.archive-total-size
properties.description: Maximum total size of archived log files before deletion.

properties.name: lottocheck.logging.file.archive-max-files
properties.description: Maximum number of archived log files retained.
